channel.title: Nlp on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Nlp on Arrans github.io

item.title: infiniflow/ragflow
item.description: RAGFlow is an open-source RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) engine based on deep document understanding.

item.title: microsoft/unilm
item.description: Large-scale Self-supervised Pre-training Across Tasks, Languages, and Modalities

item.title: openvinotoolkit/openvino
item.description: OpenVINO™ is an open-source toolkit for optimizing and deploying AI inference

item.title: pemistahl/lingua-go
item.description: The most accurate natural language detection library for Go, suitable for short text and mixed-language text

item.title: louisfb01/best_AI_papers_2023
item.description: A curated list of the latest breakthroughs in AI (in 2023) by release date with a clear video explanation, link to a more in-depth article, and code.
